pr.title: [Non-Record] Whirlpool v5b — Non-Euclidean Lorentzian Attention on the Hyperboloid Manifold

output.summary: Hyperboloid Lorentzian attention with a custom Triton kernel and curvature-progressive shared blocks for depth.
techniques: - Minkowski inner-product attention on the hyperboloid via a fused Flash Lorentz kernel
- Shared 3-block architecture run through 8 curvature-progressive orbits for depth with few stored params
- Scale clamping plus extended warmup to stabilize non-Euclidean training
